sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent & Tester Agent: Formulate functional integration suites utilizing Testcontainers to deploy isolated transient PostgreSQL instances.
Tester Agent: Execute automated horizontal multi-tenant penetration tests to confirm zero cross-tenant database isolation leaks.
Bug Fixer Agent: Trigger native build checks, catch test container configuration anomalies, and execute auto-patch iterations.
Documentation Agent: Compile pipeline setup guides, environment container specs, and isolation verification logs.
Coder Agent: Configure SmallRye Reactive Messaging to serialize and publish validated transaction structures to the primary attendance-events channel.
Tester Agent: Verify structural packet serialization correctness and partition key routing assignments based on active tenant IDs.
Bug Fixer Agent: Identify SmallRye internal messaging anomalies or partition mapping issues, and execute auto-repair iterations.
Documentation Agent: Map data stream topologies, partition layout rules, and reactive producer thread execution schemas.

Coder Agent: Deploy asynchronous message consumers implementing Mutiny fan-out operators to multiply transactions across split routes while immediately committing PENDING tracking logs to notification_delivery_logs.
Tester Agent: Validate parallel message routing performance and assert non-blocking streaming isolation profiles.
Bug Fixer Agent: Mitigate concurrent thread locks or data mapping errors dynamically on reactive loops execution paths.
Documentation Agent: Chart stream multiplexing flowcharts, data fork logic parameters, and reactive concurrency settings.

Coder Agent: Build declarative REST Client Reactive interfaces driving personal alerts and group CRM messages, mutating log states to SENT or FAILED on response inside notification_delivery_logs dynamically.
Tester Agent: Mock third-party API return strings to verify accurate error parsing and log mutation compliance.
Bug Fixer Agent: Resolve REST Client integration anomalies, fix response proxy mapping gaps, and auto-patch codes.
Documentation Agent: Outline certified Zalo communication templates, authentication signature workflows, and error code maps.
Coder Agent: Mount core Firebase Admin SDK abstractions dispatching system notifications via fcm_tokens and managing lifecycle tracking states inside notification_delivery_logs audit records.
Tester Agent: Verify structural visual alert building parameters and exception interception routing metrics.
Bug Fixer Agent: Handle asynchronous SDK initialization failure dependencies, and rewrite code blocks cleanly.
Documentation Agent: Compile remote terminal authorization protocols, tracking models, and background device alerting architectures.
Coder Agent & Tester Agent: Deploy comprehensive Testcontainers clusters verifying multi-node data stream orchestration logic under system stress constraints.
Tester Agent: Inject network blocks to verify automatic retry profiles and poison pill isolation boundaries inside structural DLQ topics.
Bug Fixer Agent: Execute test compiler loops, eliminate reactive stream crashes under pipeline breaks, and patch integration dependencies.
Documentation Agent: Chart failure containment policies, backoff interval profiles, and disaster recovery procedures.
